info.name: POB Management API
info.description:
✅ **ALL 8 PHASES COMPLETE** — Production-Ready POB Management API

API for managing Personnel On Board, Vessels, Rooms, Certificates, Compliance, Scheduling, Activities, Travel, Minimum Manning, and Reporting across offshore operations.

## Phases Completed
- Phase 1: Foundation (Auth, RBAC, DB, Redis) ✅
- Phase 2: Personnel & Compliance ✅  
- Phase 3: Vessel & Room Management ✅
- Phase 4: Roles & Rotation Scheduling ✅
- Phase 5: Activity Management (Gantt, Approvals) ✅
- Phase 6: Travel & Mobilization ✅
- Phase 7: Minimum Manning Mode ✅
- Phase 8: Dashboard & Reporting (PDF/CSV) ✅

## Authentication
All secured endpoints require a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header.

Use `POST /api/v1/auth/login` or `POST /api/v1/auth/register` to obtain tokens.

## Base URL
`{{base_url}}` defaults to `http://localhost:8080`

request.description: Returns the health status of the API.

item.name: Auth

request.description:
Register a new organization and its system admin user. Returns auth tokens on success.

**Auto-saves:** `access_token`, `refresh_token`, and `user_id` to collection variables.

Authenticate with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.

**Auto-saves:** `access_token`, `refresh_token`, and `user_id` to collection variables.

Use a valid refresh token to obtain a new access/refresh token pair.

**Auto-saves:** `access_token` and `refresh_token` to collection variables.
Invalidates the current user's refresh token. Requires authentication.
Returns the currently authenticated user's profile.
Update the authenticated user's first and last name.
Change the authenticated user's password. Requires current password verification. Invalidates existing refresh tokens.

item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, token refresh, logout, and profile management.

item.name: Users

request.description:
Create a new user within the organization. Requires `assign_user_role` permission.

**Valid Roles:** `system_admin`, `oim`, `safety_admin`, `planner`, `activity_owner`, `personnel`
List all users within the authenticated user's organization. Requires `list_users` permission.
Fetch a specific user by their ID.
Update a user's profile details. Requires `update_user` permission.

Assign a new role to a user. Requires `assign_user_role` permission.

**Valid Roles:** `system_admin`, `oim`, `safety_admin`, `planner`, `activity_owner`, `personnel`
Deactivate (soft-delete) a user. Requires `deactivate_user` permission.

item.description: User management endpoints. All require authentication and appropriate RBAC permissions.

item.name: Positions (Offshore Roles)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Crane Operator",
  "code": "CRANE-OP",
  "description": "Operates fixed and mobile cranes on the installation",
  "type": "Core",
  "required_certificate_types": [],
  "requires_room": true
}

request.description:
Create a new offshore role / position.

**Type:** `Core` or `Flexible`
List all defined offshore roles / positions.

item.description: Offshore roles (positions) define job functions and their certificate requirements.

item.name: Personnel

request.description: Register a new personnel member. Provide `offshore_role_ids` as an array of valid role ObjectIDs.
List all registered personnel.
Update an existing personnel member's details.
Delete a personnel member.
Check a personnel member's certification compliance against their assigned offshore roles. Returns compliance status: `Compliant`, `Non-Compliant`, or details of missing / expired certificates.

item.description: Personnel management: CRUD and compliance checks for offshore workers.

item.name: Certificates

request.description:
Add a certificate to a personnel member. The `certificate_type` must match a valid certificate type code.

Status is auto-calculated: `Valid`, `Expiring` (< 30 days), or `Expired`.
List all certificates belonging to a specific personnel member.
Update an existing certificate's details (e.g., after renewal).
Delete a certificate from a personnel member's record.

item.description: Certificate management for personnel. Certificates are scoped under a personnel member.

item.name: Notifications

request.description: Fetch all notifications for the currently authenticated user. Includes certificate expiry reminders and compliance alerts.
Mark a specific notification as read.

item.description: System notifications, including certificate expiry reminders.

item.name: Vessels

request.description:
Create a new vessel or installation.

**Vessel Types:** `FPSO`, `Platform`, `Jack-Up`, `Semi-Sub`, `Drillship`

`pob_capacity` sets the hard limit for room assignments. A Redis counter is initialized at 0.
List all vessels and installations.
Fetch a single vessel by its ID.
Update vessel details.
Delete a vessel.
Get the live Personnel On Board count for a vessel. This is a fast Redis-based query — not a database scan.
Get the full active room assignment manifest for a vessel — all currently assigned personnel.

item.description: Vessel and installation management with real-time POB tracking.

item.name: Rooms

request.description:
Create a room within a vessel.

**Category:** `Dedicated` (for core crew) or `Transient` (for flexible / visiting)

`capacity` = number of beds in the room.
List all rooms belonging to a specific vessel.

Assign a personnel member to a room bed on a vessel.

**Enforcement chain:**
1. Room capacity check
2. Personnel compliance check (cert blocking)
3. Vessel POB capacity check (Redis atomic increment)

**Type:** `Core` (requires `offshore_role_id`) or `Flexible` (requires `activity_id` and `ends_at`)

response.name: 400 – Vessel POB Exceeded

request.description: Fetch a specific room by its ID.
Update room details.
Delete a room.
List all active room assignments (current occupants) for a specific room.

item.description: Room management and personnel-to-room assignment with capacity enforcement.

item.name: Rotation & Scheduling
item.description: Phase 4 - Rotation schedules, role assignments, back-to-back pairs

item.name: Activities
item.description: Phase 5 - Activity management, approvals, gantt charts
